title: Idomacromiidae
description: **_Idomacromiidae_** is a family of dragonflies (Odonata, Anisoptera). The family was established based on phylogenetic analysis showing that certain emerald-like dragonflies do not belong within Corduliidae. In Europe, the family is represented by a single genus and species, *Oxygastra curtisii*, which was long considered *incertae sedis* following studies showing it did not belong in Corduliidae. Molecular phylogenetic work has since placed it within Idomacromiidae.
